nasb.text: Then he shall take the cedar wood and the hyssop and the scarlet string, with the live bird, and dip them in the blood of the slain bird as well as in the running water, and sprinkle the house seven times.

esv.text: and shall take the cedarwood and the hyssop and the scarlet yarn, along with the live bird, and dip them in the blood of the bird that was killed and in the fresh water and sprinkle the house seven times.

cnv.text: 然後拿香柏木、牛膝草、朱紅色線和那隻活鳥，都一同蘸在被宰殺的鳥血和活水中，向房屋彈七次。

ccb.text: 然后用香柏木、牛膝草、朱红色线和另一只活鸟蘸掺了清水的鸟血，向房子洒七次。
